title: Velvety Fresh German Peppers Casserole
description: A indulgent, creamy and caramelized pepper casserole that showcases fresh German bell peppers in a velvety sauce.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F) and grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with butter.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add sliced peppers, mushrooms, and sweet potato. Cook, stirring, until peppers soften and edges caramelize, about 10-12 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over the vegetables and stir to coat. Cook for 1 minute.
Pour in vegetable broth and heavy cream, stirring to combine. Add smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Bring to a gentle simmer and let thicken for 3-4 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and spread evenly.
Bake uncovered for 20-25 minutes, until the top is golden and vegetables are tender.
Remove from oven and let rest 5 minutes. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
